category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a Fast Lexical Analyzer generating scanners; official manual describes flex as a tool for generating pattern-matching programs: https://westes.github.io/flex/manual/
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name are `flex`; official manual heading and GitHub repo use `flex`: https://westes.github.io/flex/manual/
docs_sources: Official flex manual is published at westes.github.io and provides tutorial/reference documentation: https://westes.github.io/flex/manual/
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables include flex/flex++/lex; official manual documents flex scanner generation for C/C++ style lexing workflows: https://westes.github.io/flex/manual/
